name: Saboteur

abilities.name: Set Up for Success
abilities.text: Once per activation. When a Scheme marker within 6" is removed, this model may have an ally within 6" gain a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Unionized
abilities.text: While within 3" of another ally, this model receives a (+) to its Df and Wp duels.

actions.name: Cunning Ploy
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Staggered token, this model may add any one suit to its duel total.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Steal Intel
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 2" of the target. When resolving, this action deals +2 damage to the target.

actions.name: Countdown
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a marker. If this model is in severe or concealing terrain, increase the TN of the Sp duel by 2.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (Y)1" of the target must pass a TN 11 Sp duel or gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Flying Debris
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models that failed this duel. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Sudden But Inevitable Sabotage
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target.

actions.name: Unnatural Speed
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.

extraction_notes: STN: 8 value visible below the character portrait
